column2: Verify that an admin can roll a challenge back to a previous image version
column3:
1. Login to admin.fctf.site as an admin.
2. Open a docker-backed challenge that already has at least two versions.
3. Open the Versions tab.
4. Open the detail page of a row marked OLD.
5. Click Rollback to This Version.
6. Confirm the rollback in the modal dialog.
7. Return to the challenge detail page and review the Versions tab again.
column4:
- Rollback succeeds and the page displays Challenge rolled back to version.
- The version detail page shows the currently active version banner.
- The challenge Versions tab still contains an ACTIVE row after rollback.
- The challenge configuration is restored to the selected version.
column5:
- Admin is logged in to admin.fctf.site.
- The challenge has at least two recorded versions.
- The chosen rollback target is currently marked OLD.
